summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Brand Settings functionality - Backend APIs fully functional, public booking page brand integration working correctly

ui_bugs.issue: Login form not redirecting properly after successful authentication in some cases

passed_tests: PUT /api/brand - Admin can update brand settings and changes persist
POST /api/brand/logo - Logo upload with authentication works
POST /api/brand/logo - Invalid file types correctly rejected
Booking page displays brand business name in header
Booking page shows brand hero title and subtitle
Booking page footer displays brand contact information
Brand settings dynamically update public booking page
API updates reflect immediately on booking page
action_item_for_main_agent: Minor login form redirect issue - session management may need adjustment. All core Brand Settings functionality is working correctly including API endpoints, booking page integration, and dynamic brand display.
